concepts.finding:
The main contributions of
DIEN are as following:
• We focus on interest evolving phenomenon in e-
commerce system, and propose a new structure of net-
work to model interest evolving process.
concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

ture of DIEN and introduce the techniques that are used for

concepts.finding:
Deep Interest Evolution Network
Different from sponsored search, in many e-commerce plat-
forms like online display advertisement, users do not show
their intention clearly, so capturing user interest and their
dynamics is important for CTR prediction.
concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

concepts.finding:
After modifying
the GRU architecture by embedding information from the
attention mechanism, AGRU can extract key information
in complex queries effectively.
concepts.implication: Useful for building item/user embeddings in retrieval systems

ments for both public datasets, it reﬂects the importance of
supervision information for the learning of sequential in-
terests and embedding representation.

Alibaba Inc, Beijing, China

concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

concepts.finding:
In this pa-
per, we propose a novel model, named Deep Interest Evolu-
tion Network (DIEN), for CTR prediction.
concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

concepts.finding:
At this layer, we introduce
an auxiliary loss to supervise interest extracting at each step.
concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

concepts.finding:
In the ex-
periments on both public and industrial datasets, DIEN sig-
niﬁcantly outperforms the state-of-the-art solutions.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Notably,
DIEN has been deployed in the display advertisement system
of Taobao, and obtained 20.7% improvement on CTR.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
In CPC adver-
tising system, the performance of click-through rate (CTR)
prediction not only inﬂuences the ﬁnal revenue of whole
platform, but also impacts user experience and satisfaction.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
Based on all these observations, we propose Deep Inter-
est Evolution Network (DIEN) to improve the performance
of CTR prediction.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Pointing at the
problem that hidden state of GRU is less targeted for inter-
est representation, we propose one auxiliary loss.

concepts.finding:

tions.
